threats.title: Apache ActiveMQ CVE-2026-34197 Added to CISA KEV Amid Active Exploitation
threats.summary: A recently disclosed high-severity security flaw in Apache ActiveMQ Classic has come under active exploitation in the wild, per the U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). threats.title: Newly Discovered PowMix Botnet Hits Czech Workers Using Randomized C2 Traffic
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of an active malicious campaign that's targeting the workforce in the Czech Republic with a previously undocumented botnet dubbed PowMix since at least December 2025. threats.title: 'Harmless' Global Adware Transforms Into an AV Killer

threats.summary: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not phishing. Not weak passwords.
